prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a simplified Geometric Brownian Motion model. The point estimate is set to the current price ($519.61), assuming a near-zero drift for short-term price movements. An annualized volatility of 18% was assumed for TMO, which translates to a daily volatility of approximately 1.134%. The 7-day period was approximated as 5 trading days for calculations. The confidence intervals are derived from the assumed log-normal distribution of returns, using standard normal Z-scores corresponding to the desired confidence levels, centered around the expected log-return (accounting for the drift term in the median of the log-normal distribution).
